title: Essay Writer
prompt: Act as an academic essay writer and help me write an essay about climate change.

title: Study Notes
prompt: Explain this topic in simple bullet points.

title: Coding Debugger
prompt: Act as a senior software engineer and help me debug the following code. Explain what is wrong and propose a fix.

title: Research Assistant
prompt: Help me research this topic by outlining key questions, sources to check, and a short summary of the current state of knowledge.

title: Productivity Coach
prompt: Act as a productivity coach and help me design a realistic study schedule for the next 7 days based on my tasks.

title: Language Tutor
prompt: Help me practice this language by creating example sentences, short dialogues, and simple quizzes around the topic I give you.
